summary: Four buildings assessed in the scene show confirmed no damage, with all structural elements, windows, and facades appearing intact and undamaged. The overall scene depicts a well-maintained, functional urban campus with active pedestrian movement and no visible signs of destruction or impact. Given the confirmed undamaged state of all assessed buildings, there is no evidence of functional impairment to the facilities.
